goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 11:00' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should go to 'stevenage' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'phone number', and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 11:00 and should leave on wednesday
The train should go to stevenage and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get address, phone number, and entrance fee
